title.en: An arm was outstretched, pitch black and covere...

content.en:
Click!!!

The sound of the void cracking suddenly came from the light curtain of this extra-dimensional formation, and it was a peak realm god who was tearing through the super-dimensional barrier.

Soon.

An arm was outstretched, pitch black and covered with eerie scales.

Immediately after, a figure walked out, its appearance extremely ugly and strange, but the aura of its body was extremely powerful.

He was a pinnacle realm god of the Ice Ghost Organization.

After this peak realm god came over, another peak realm god immediately came.

Subsequently, one after another, the peak realm gods came over.

It didn't take long for more than sixty Peak Realm Gods to come, and each of them was extremely powerful.

Wow!

One of the pinnacle realm gods sacrificed a treasure ship, this treasure ship was a high-level super-dimensional secret treasure, and its strong aura blocked the power of the Death Void.

"The pinnacle realm gods of Xuandong Mountain, from now on, you are under my control. "

A pinnacle realm god said.

He is the leader of the Ice Ghost Organization's operation this time - the pinnacle realm god - the bloodline realm god!

As for the Ice Ghost Organization's Ziya Realm God, naturally he won't come over, the Ziya Realm God is 05 specifically responsible for the liaison of various territories, if he leaves, then the Ice Ghost Organization will not be able to contact various territories, and it will become a plate of scattered sand.

"I've seen the Blood Realm God!"

The gods of the Six Caves said respectfully, and they didn't dare to be disrespectful at all, otherwise they would offend the Ice Ghost Organization, and they would have no good fruit to eat.

"Six Cave Realm Gods, you lead the way, after all, we are not familiar with this place. "

The God of the Blood Realm commanded.

Any territory is very dangerous, even if it is the Ice Ghost Organization, they dare not trespass, otherwise they may be wiped out if they enter a dangerous forbidden place.

Therefore, if there is a Xuandong Mountain Realm God to lead the way, it will be much safer.

The Six Cave Realm God was very annoyed in his heart at this time, this extra-dimensional formation was moving so much, but the Ice Ghost Organization did not say anything.

I thought there was no movement, but when the time came, the ice ghosts organized it, and they could retreat secretly.

But I never expected that they would be directly exposed now.

......

Now.

The other supreme forces all knew that Xuandong Mountain had taken refuge in the forces of other territories, and they were extremely angry one by one, and there was no point in questioning at this time.

Whether to flee or to fight.

For the first time, the pinnacle realm gods of the supreme power met one after another.

And Ye Tian also participated.

At the meeting, the Liangyi Realm God said quickly: "Everyone, there is trouble, Xuandong Mountain contacted a force in other territories, and used a certain formation to break the super-dimensional barrier, so that the peak realm gods of other forces came in, and it is estimated that there are dozens of peak realm gods, each of which is extremely powerful, but now it can't be spied on, obviously there is a more powerful super-dimensional secret treasure, which has evaded our prying eyes." "

Taiyi Realm Divine Dao: "They are still some distance away from the realm of the Realm God Kingdom, but it won't be long before they arrive here." When the time comes, we'll be in trouble!"

The gods of the realm were extremely panicked, and there was no hope of asking for help at this time.

Even if there is a half-step transcendent realm from the Two Realms Gate, not to mention that he can't return to the 7362nd realm, even if he can come back, it won't be too late.

"Maybe if we join forces, we still have hope of beating those foreign peak realm gods!" said a peak realm god.

The god of the Liangyi Realm smiled bitterly: "They are a force that can cross the superdimensional barrier, but we can't do it, not even a half-step superdimensional realm, even if they don't have a strong person like the half-step superdimensional realm, but as long as they send a strong person comparable to the blood shadow puppet, it is enough to kill us." And now I don't have the Blood Shadow Golem, and I have no hope of turning the tables around. "

"Then run away, flee into the Death Void, hide, the Death Void is so big, and there are many dangers, even the mysterious foreign force does not dare to look for it in the Death Void, unless they want to find death!"

"Escape is indeed a hope, but it must be as soon as possible, otherwise once they arrive, there will be no hope of escape!"

"Then run away!"

A peak realm god said helplessly.

Even if they brought them, they wouldn't be able to bring many high-level realm gods, let alone those weak creatures.

The point is, there is too much time, you have to leave as soon as possible, and there is no time to gather other realm gods.

......

At this time.

Already the Supreme Force had begun to flee, quickly escaping from the Boundary Rift into the Death Void, then gathering its breath and leaving along a safe route.

There is still a supreme force still lingering, and soon the Ice Ghost Organization has arrived.

Rumble!!!

The barriers of the realm of the gods were torn apart.

The treasure ship of the Ice Ghost Organization descended directly to the realm of the gods.

"What, they're coming, how could they be so fast!"

"It's that treasure ship, its speed is definitely beyond our imagination, it's over, we can't escape!"

Rumble!!!

A jewel was sacrificed, and the light shrouded the realm of the gods, the realm of eternity, and even the realms of many realms, all of which were affected by this bead and sealed off here.

At this moment, none of these peak realm gods could escape, and they were all blocked.

"Under the Extra-Dimensional Sealing Boundary Bead, unless the half-step Extradimensional Realm can be easily broken, it will take a long time to hope to break it. The Blood Realm God said.

This is the treasure of his attack on some weak territories, and every time he can intercept many peak realm gods who want to escape. 827

As for some of the peak realm gods who escaped, if they were pursued in the later stage, they really couldn't be hunted down, and if these peak realm gods escaped in time, they couldn't take away much resources.

They don't care about the lives of these peak realm gods, they only care about resources.

It's good to get resources, don't care about anything else.

The pinnacle realm god of the small 7362 realm, it is difficult to be able to threaten their ice ghost organization, even if it is the existence of a half-step transcendent realm, they cannot find their ice ghost organization.

Besides, they also have backers behind the Ice Ghost Organization, so they are not afraid.

Immediately, the Blood Realm God spoke, and the voice spread throughout the Eternal Realm, the Realm God Realm, and the Boundary Rift Realm.

"I am the Ice Ghost Organization's pinnacle realm god blood realm god, from now on, start robbing, all supreme forces will hand over extradimensional resources, otherwise there will be no forgiveness!"

One second!

Two seconds!

Time passed slowly, and those supreme forces did not move.

Seeing this, the Blood Realm God was annoyed and ordered his subordinates to attack these supreme forces, and he would do it himself.

Prior to this, Xuandong Mountain had already sold the intelligence of the supreme force.

Therefore, the Bloodline Realm God has a little understanding of the supreme forces here.

"The first supreme force to rob will choose Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace!"

The secret path of the god of the blood realm.
